bullets.body: **Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync (vista previa pública 1 mayo) — junto al GA del 1 mayo, Microsoft entrega cross-cloud Agent Registry Sync con AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform; mapa relaciones por agente Defender expone servidores MCP + identidades + recursos cloud como vista operativa única; integra con Entra ID + Purview + Intune + Defender; Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI nombrados como próximas integraciones agente local después del camino entrada open-source OpenClaw; descargas mensuales MCP SDK ~97M en marzo 2026** — primer primitivo cross-cloud identidad agente ampliamente desplegado; acelera la tesis MCP-Gateway de "ola producto single-vendor" a "interoperabilidad protocolo registro".

bullets.body: **Microsoft Agent 365 GA traslado — $15/usuario/mes (M365 E7 SKU a $99/usuario); tres pilares (observe / govern / secure); tools management para allow/block servidor MCP; junio 2026 Defender agrega mapeo asset-context por agente (devices, MCP servers, identities, cloud resources); GCC + GCC High fines 2026, DoD inicio 2027** — baseline standing para categoría agent-control-plane.

bullets.body: **CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA traslado — Cloud Security Alliance autorizada como MITRE CVE Numbering Authority para vulnerabilidades agentic-AI (29 abril); STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex (rollout 4-fases junio 2026 → diciembre 2027); AARM (Vanta) + ATF (transferido desde MassiveScale.AI) especificaciones adquiridas** — baseline standing para régimen divulgación clase amenaza agent-skills.

**MITRE ATT&CK v19 (28 abril) traslado — Defense Evasion (TA0005) se divide en Stealth (TA0005) + Defense Impairment (TA0112); framework v5.4 agrega AI-agent context poisoning / tool invocation abuse / MCP server compromise / malicious agent deployment como técnicas nombradas** — referencia standing.

**arxiv 2604.24929 — "GAIA-v2-LILT: Multilingual Adaptation of Agent Benchmark beyond Translation"** — eval agent multi-locale que aborda fallas task-logic introducidas por traducción máquina sobre el sustrato GAIA-v2.
**arxiv 2604.13072 — "LiveClawBench: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Complex, Real-World Assistant Tasks"** — agent benchmark live en tareas asistente real-world en múltiples ejes dificultad.
**arxiv 2604.09285 — "SAGE: A Service Agent Graph-guided Evaluation Benchmark"** — benchmark multi-agent universal con Dynamic Dialogue Graphs formalizados desde SOPs no-estructuradas.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > vLLM

bullets.body: **vLLM v0.20.0 (27 abril) traslado a 3 mayo — parchea CVE-2026-0994; HuggingFace Transformers v5+ compatibility fixes; PyTorch 2.11 para CUDA + XPU; Python 3.14 agregado a lista soportada; Model Runner V2 + day-one Gemma 4 support a través E2B / E4B / 26B MoE / 31B Dense; baseline v0.18.0 — gRPC serving + GPU NGram speculative decoding + FlexKV cache offload backend; CUDA 13.0 default** — referencia standing.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > SGLang

bullets.body: **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — sigue sin parche en 3 mayo (~14 días post-divulgación, el CVE LLM-tooling sin parche más largo de 2026); v0.5.10 ships exploitable; jinja2.Environment() en vez de ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment para tokenizer.chat_template habilita RCE en /v1/rerank vía archivo modelo GGUF crafted; guidance mitigación CERT/CC: sustituir ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment hasta upstream fix; clase cross-server a vLLM + LMDeploy + 28 abril Spring AI + 26 abril LiteLLM** — coordinación maintainer no rinde upstream fix; PoC continúa circulando; CERT/CC VU#915947 active.

**SGLang TurboQuant integration traslado — PR #21419 in-tree (`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`); follow-up #23134 fused-Triton-decode/extend kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput vs ~1% on the original implementation** — referencia standing.

citations.label: GitHub Issue - SGLang #23134 TurboQuant fused Triton kernels

citations.label: GitHub Discussion - llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant Extreme KV Cache Quantization

bullets.body: **Ollama v0.21.x traslado — `max` think-parameter + improved OpenAI response mapping for reasoning effort; Hermes + GitHub Copilot CLI integration in `ollama launch`; Gemma 4 MLX text-only runtime** — baseline standing.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > Unsloth

bullets.body: **Unsloth 2026.4.8 (PyPI) traslado a 1-3 mayo — inference 20-30% faster (parity with llama-server / llama.cpp); GGUF export expanded to full fine-tunes; auto-detect of LM Studio / HF / similar pre-existing models; faster MoE 30B-A3B (17.5GB VRAM) + 235B-A22B; MoE 12x faster + 35% less VRAM + 6x longer context via new Triton + math kernels with no accuracy loss; Gemma-4-E2B 8GB VRAM training (~1.5x faster, ~60% less VRAM than FA2); new model support DeepSeek-OCR 2 / GLM-4.7-Flash / Kimi-2.5; Unsloth Studio local no-code UI; ~1.8-3.3x faster embedding fine-tuning; 7x longer-context RL via new batching algorithms** — baseline standing on-device fine-tuning junto a Bonsai-8B + TurboQuant; per project memory Unsloth debe buscarse cada daily-update run.

**Unsloth Studio (traslado) — local no-code UI con nuevo botón shutdown + comportamiento terminal-close apropiado; posicionado para round-trip fine-tune + inference + GGUF-export on-device** — referencia standing.

sections.category: Local LLM Optimization (Fine-tuning, KV-cache, Inference) > KV-Cache Compression Stack

bullets.body: **TurboQuant (Google Research, ICLR 2026, arxiv 2504.19874) traslado — 3.5-bit-per-value KV-cache compression matching FP16 on LongBench / Needle-in-a-Haystack with no retraining; 6x compression, 8x faster attention; community ports in MLX + Triton + vLLM + SGLang** — traslado standing.

**PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27 abril) traslado — shared asymmetrically-compressed KV-pool for multi-agent LLM inference; int8 keys + 3-bit TurboQuant-MSE values via HF DynamicCache injection; on Llama-3-8B with 15 agents sharing 4K-token context cuts KV-cache memory from 19.8GB to 0.45GB (-97.7%)** — traslado.

**arxiv 2604.24647 — "DepthKV: Layer-Dependent KV Cache Pruning for Long-Context LLM Inference"** — KV-cache pruning layer-dependent calibrado por capa en vez de un ratio compresión uniforme; complementa el patrón cross-agent sharing de PolyKV.
**arxiv 2604.10235 — CodeComp: Structural KV Cache Compression for Agentic Coding** traslado.
**arxiv 2604.25080 — CacheFlow: Efficient LLM Serving with 3D-Parallel KV Cache Restoration** traslado.
**arxiv 2604.03143 — TokenDance: Scaling Multi-Agent LLM Serving via Collective KV Cache Sharing** traslado.
**arxiv 2604.19769 — TTKV: Temporal-Tiered KV Cache for Long-Context LLM Inference** traslado.
**NVIDIA kvpress traslado — Decoding-Press maturity; ExpectedAttentionPress with configurable compression ratios (0.7 / 0.5); AIME25 + Math500 + LongBench benchmarks** — baseline standing.

sections.category: AI Security > CVE / KEV / Threat Intelligence (CVSS ≥ 8.0)

bullets.body: **CISA KEV 1 mayo traslado — CVE-2026-31431 "Copy Fail" Linux kernel local privilege escalation; CVSS 7.8 pero BOD-22-01 mandatorio; deadline federal remediación 15 mayo; algif_aead AF_ALG socket + splice() interaction enables a 4-byte write into kernel page cache of any readable file, corrupting in-memory representation of /usr/bin/su to yield root without modifying the on-disk binary; affects virtually every Linux distro from 2017 onward (Ubuntu 24.04 LTS, Amazon Linux 2023, RHEL 10.1, SUSE 16, Debian, Fedora, Arch); multiple in-the-wild attacks against US think tanks + European manufacturing + cloud service providers; chains with web-app/VPN-appliance RCE for initial foothold** — base instalada KEV-affected single-vendor más grande de 2026; 14-day deadline federal es la segunda más estricta del año.

citations.label: Microsoft Security Blog - CVE-2026-31431 Copy Fail

bullets.body: **CISA KEV 30 abril traslado — agrega CVE-2026-41940 WebPros cPanel & WHM Missing-Authentication-for-Critical-Function; deadline federal 21 mayo** — traslado standing; cPanel maneja decenas miles flotas shared-hosting.

**LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (CVSS 9.3) traslado — pre-auth SQLi against /chat/completions Authorization header; one litellm_credentials row leaks OpenAI org keys + Anthropic admin tokens + AWS Bedrock IAM credentials; patched in v1.83.7-stable 19 abril; first observed exploitation 26 abril 16:17 UTC (~26h post-advisory)** — el caso 2026 LLM-gateway-as-blast-radius.

**arxiv 2602.22603 — "SideQuest: Model-Driven KV Cache Management for Long-Horizon Agentic Reasoning"** — Leverages el Large Reasoning Model itself to perform KV cache compression by reasoning about the usefulness of tokens, framed as an auxiliary task executed in parallel to the main reasoning task.
**arxiv 2604.24647 — "DepthKV: Layer-Dependent KV Cache Pruning for Long-Context LLM Inference"** traslado.
**arxiv 2604.24929 — "GAIA-v2-LILT: Multilingual Adaptation of Agent Benchmark beyond Translation"** traslado.
**arxiv 2604.13072 — "LiveClawBench"** traslado.
**arxiv 2604.09285 — "SAGE: A Service Agent Graph-guided Evaluation Benchmark"** traslado.

**arxiv 2604.27776 traslado — WindowsWorld (process-centric benchmark of autonomous GUI agents in professional cross-application environments)** — referencia standing para cross-app agentic GUI evaluation.
**arxiv 2604.24955 traslado — BenchGuard (first automated auditing framework for execution-based agent benchmarks; identified 12 author-confirmed issues in ScienceAgentBench)** — referencia standing.

**preprints.org 202604.0428 traslado — Agent Harness for LLM Agents Survey (la harness layer is the binding constraint for agent system performance as tasks grow longer and more complex)** — referencia standing.

citations.label: Preprints.org - Agent Harness for LLM Agents: A Survey

bullets.body: **ICLR 2026 outstanding papers traslado a mayo (anuncio 23 abril, 5,300+ accepted papers; 225 oral presentations) — "LLMs Get Lost In Multi-Turn Conversation" (Laban / Hayashi / Zhou / Neville); Common Corpus (ethical LLM pre-training data); Q-RAG (multi-step retrieval via RL-trained embedders); WebDevJudge (LLM-as-a-judge for web dev); SafeDPO (safe direct preference optimization); MedAgentGym (agentic biomedical training)** — referencia standing para finding multi-turn conversation degradation paired with PolyKV + ClawVM + ola broader 2026 agentic-context-management research.

sections.category: Bay Area / SV AI Meet-up Events

bullets.body: **AI Tinkerers SF Generative UI Global Hackathon: Agentic Interfaces (9 mayo) — engineers build agentic UIs from model output, supported by Google DeepMind + CopilotKit; build interactive UIs from model output using cutting-edge protocols, defining the generative UI stack through tool-enabled interface execution** — primer Bay Area "agentic interfaces" hackathon con sponsorship foundation-lab + UI-toolkit.
**AgentCon SF 4 mayo (traslado) — agent + skills + harness conference cadence into May/June; call for speakers earlier in April** — traslado standing.

**LangChain Interrupt SF 13-14 mayo (traslado) — main agent conference at The Midway, 900 Marin St., SF Dogpatch; Day 1 keynote 9:30 AM con Harrison Chase + Shreya Shankar; sessions on building/debugging/shipping reliable agents alongside LangChain product experts; lessons from Clay / Rippling / Workday production** — traslado standing.

**Microsoft Build 2-3 junio SF (Fort Mason, traslado) — 8 distinct session formats (deep-dive talks, interactive labs, peer-collaborative debugging); in-person attendance reducida a ~2,500 (down from 5,000+ in prior years); Satya Nadella opening keynote on AI strategy + Azure roadmap + dev tooling; GitHub + Microsoft Foundry leadership presenting; in-person tickets $1,099; keynotes livestreamed free** — traslado standing; el ancla post-Agent-365-GA platform.

bullets.body: **Simon Willison weblog 2 mayo "Sightings" — pequeña app JS fetching iNaturalist data para sindicación homepage personal, construida en teléfono con Claude Code for web; backfills década observaciones iNaturalist en site search + páginas archivo fecha** — punto data Personal-AI-as-headless-tooling; misma adyacencia 'Headless Everything' dormant-pool que la discusión Codex CLI 0.128.0 changelog del 1 mayo.

**Powell stays on Federal Reserve Board past 15 mayo Chair-term expiration traslado (first Fed Chair since 1948 to remain on Board); Warsh nomination confirmed by Senate Banking 29 abril; full-Senate vote pending; Powell on Board through 2028; 4 mayo Apr Jobs Report 8 mayo first major non-earnings macro tape into Chair handoff** — traslado a semana AMD 5 mayo + abril empleo 8 mayo.

(China terminal that imported tens of millions of barrels of sanctioned Iranian crude); Treasury sanctions 3 Iranian currency exchange houses + IRGC/MODAFL-linked individuals processing billions annually; layered with Trump's standing 25% secondary-tariff threat on Iran trading partners + 50% tariff threat on weapons suppliers** — paquete Irán single-day más grande de Q2 2026; el WTI +12% week-on-week move es la consecuencia macro estructural.
